name: BACARDÍ Coquito
title: Coquito Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Coquito Cocktail | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A festive Puerto Rican coconut-and-spice rum punch made with Bacardí Carta Blanca.
marketing_description: It’s not a holiday in Puerto Rico without Coquito, and it’s not an original Coquito without BACARDÍ.

steps: Pour all ingredients into a large punch bowl and mix.
Serve in individual cordial glasses or mugs.
Garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon or a cinnamon stick.

garnish: a sprinkle of cinnamon or a cinnamon stick
raw_text_excerpt: How to make a BACARDÍ Coquito Ingredients 480 ML BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum 355 ML evaporated milk 355 ML coconut cream 355 ML sweetened condensed milk vanilla spices Punch Bowl ... Pour all ingredients into a large punch bowl and mix. Chill Refrigerate before serving. Serve in individual cordial glasses or mugs. Garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon or a cinnamon stick.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Coquito Rum Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
